en: But I, brothers, could not address you as spiritual people, but as people of the flesh, as infants in Christ.
zh: 弟兄們，我從前對你們說話，還不能把你們看作屬靈的人，只能看作屬肉體的人，看作在基督裡的嬰孩。

en: I fed you with milk, not solid food, for you were not ready for it. And even now you are not yet ready,
zh: 我餵給你們吃的是奶，不是飯，因為那時你們不能吃，就是現在還是不能，

en: for you are still of the flesh. For while there is jealousy and strife among you, are you not of the flesh and behaving only in a human way?
zh: 因為你們仍然是屬肉體的。在你們當中既然有嫉妒紛爭，你們不還是屬肉體，照著世人的方式而行嗎？

en: For when one says, "I follow Paul," and another, "I follow Apollos," are you not being merely human?
zh: 有人說“我是保羅派的”，又有人說“我是亞波羅派的”，你們不是和世人一樣嗎？

en: What then is Apollos? What is Paul? Servants through whom you believed, as the Lord assigned to each.
zh: 亞波羅算甚麼？保羅算甚麼？我們不過是 神的僕人，你們藉著我們信了主；按著主所賜給各人的，

en: I planted, Apollos watered, but God gave the growth.
zh: 我栽種了，亞波羅澆灌了，唯有 神使它生長。

en: So neither he who plants nor he who waters is anything, but only God who gives the growth.
zh: 所以，栽種的算不得甚麼，澆灌的也算不得甚麼，只在乎那使它生長的 神。

en: He who plants and he who waters are one, and each will receive his wages according to his labor.
zh: 栽種的和澆灌的都是一樣，只是各人要照著自己的勞苦得著自己的報酬。

en: For we are God's fellow workers. You are God's field, God's building.
zh: 我們是 神的同工，你們是 神的田地， 神的房屋。

en: According to the grace of God given to me, like a skilled master builder I laid a foundation, and someone else is building upon it. Let each one take care how he builds upon it.
zh: 我照著 神賜給我的恩典，就像一個聰明的工程師，立好了根基，別人在上面建造。各人要注意怎樣在上面建造，

en: For no one can lay a foundation other than that which is laid, which is Jesus Christ.
zh: 因為除了那已經立好的根基以外，沒有人能立別的根基。那根基就是耶穌基督。

en: Now if anyone builds on the foundation with gold, silver, precious stones, wood, hay, straw-
zh: 如果有人用金、銀、寶石、草、木、禾稭，在這根基上建造，

en: each one's work will become manifest, for the Day will disclose it, because it will be revealed by fire, and the fire will test what sort of work each one has done.
zh: 各人的工程將來必要顯露，因為那日子必把它顯明出來。有火要把它顯露出來，那火要考驗各人的工程是怎樣的。

en: If the work that anyone has built on the foundation survives, he will receive a reward.
zh: 如果有人在這根基上建造的工程存得住，他就要得到賞賜；

en: If anyone's work is burned up, he will suffer loss, though he himself will be saved, but only as through fire.
zh: 如果有人的工程被燒毀，他就要受虧損；自己卻要得救，只是要像從火裡經過一樣。

en: Do you not know that you are God's temple and that God's Spirit dwells in you?
zh: 難道不知道你們是 神的殿， 神的靈住在你們裡面嗎？

en: If anyone destroys God's temple, God will destroy him. For God's temple is holy, and you are that temple.
zh: 如果有人毀壞 神的殿， 神必要毀壞這人，因為 神的殿是聖潔的，這殿就是你們。

en: Let no one deceive himself. If anyone among you thinks that he is wise in this age, let him become a fool that he may become wise.
zh: 誰也不要自欺。如果你們當中有人以為自己在這世代裡是有智慧的，他就應該變為愚笨，好讓他有智慧。

en: For the wisdom of this world is folly with God. For it is written, "He catches the wise in their craftiness,"
zh: 因為這世界的智慧，在 神看來是愚笨的，如經上所記： “他使有智慧的人中了自己的詭計。”

en: and again, "The Lord knows the thoughts of the wise, that they are futile."
zh: 又說： “主知道智慧人的意念是虛妄的。”

en: So let no one boast in men. For all things are yours,
zh: 所以，誰都不可拿人來誇耀，因為一切都是你們的。

en: whether Paul or Apollos or Cephas or the world or life or death or the present or the future- all are yours,
zh: 無論是保羅，是亞波羅，是磯法，是世界，是生，是死，是現在的事，是將來的事，都是你們的。

en: and you are Christ's, and Christ is God's.
zh: 你們是屬基督的，基督是屬 神的。
